# Version 3.119.1
> **Metal and Xaml fixes** · Released September 12, 2025 · [NuGet](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/3.119.1) · [GitHub Release](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/releases/tag/v3.119.1)

> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](3.119.1/index.md) · [HarfBuzzSharp API diff](harfbuzzsharp/8.3.1.2/index.md)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 3.119.1 fixes Metal disposal and canvas hosting on iOS, tvOS and Mac Catalyst.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this release.*

## API Surface

- **PostScriptName on SKTypeface** — Adds a PostScriptName property to SKTypeface, matching what Skia already exposes. — ❤️ [@jonlipsky](https://github.com/jonlipsky) ([#3263](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3263))

## Bug Fixes

- **Metal disposal on iOS 15 and Mac Catalyst** — Disposing a GRContext on the Metal backend no longer crashes, SKMetalView is no longer initialised twice, and the iOS 15 Metal hotfix is applied. — ❤️ [@jeremy-visionaid](https://github.com/jeremy-visionaid), [@taublast](https://github.com/taublast) ([#3258](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3258), [#3256](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3256), [#3293](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3293))
- **SKXamlCanvas transparency on Mac Catalyst** — SKXamlCanvas is no longer forced opaque on Mac Catalyst, matching iOS behaviour. — ❤️ [@spouliot](https://github.com/spouliot) ([#3236](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3236))
- **Safer SKAutoCanvasRestore** — SKAutoCanvasRestore no longer crashes on Dispose when the canvas was already disposed. — ❤️ [@taublast](https://github.com/taublast) ([#3291](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3291))
- **UTC DateTime handling** — Corrects UTC DateTime conversion in the type helpers. — ❤️ [@jeremy-visionaid](https://github.com/jeremy-visionaid) ([#3333](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3333))

## HarfBuzzSharp 8.3.1.2

No HarfBuzzSharp binding changes shipped in this release — it rebuilds the same HarfBuzz as the previous line.

## Preview 1 (September 4, 2025)

Preview 1 cut the 3.119.1 line with the Metal disposal fixes, the Mac Catalyst SKXamlCanvas fix and the new PostScriptName property.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.119.0...v3.119.1-preview.1.1)
